# ListPro.AI

> Multi-platform inventory and listing management for resellers. List items on Facebook Marketplace, Poshmark, eBay, and more from a single dashboard.

ListPro.AI helps resellers track inventory, generate AI-powered SEO descriptions and price suggestions, and sync listings across multiple marketplaces.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and primary entry point.
- [Install](/install): Instructions for installing ListPro.AI as a PWA on iOS, Android, and desktop.
